## nsc workspace describe

Describe current workspace details.

```
nsc workspace describe [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help            help for describe
  -k, --key string      Select a field to print if in json output mode.
  -o, --output string   One of plain or json. (default "plain")
```
